column10: baseline: run2 start — inherited from run1 final state (after hardened prompt rules applied)
exp: add funding rate contrarian voter (avg funding >0.0003 votes against crowd) — zero impact, threshold rarely triggered
exp: add OBV trend voter (volume-flow directional signal) — hurt all regimes, rally_2024 worst (-5.2), adding 10th voter dilutes vote power
exp: add wide-range bar filter (high-low>2x avg skips entry) — catastrophic regression, filter too aggressive for hourly crypto
exp: per-asset inverse-vol sizing weights (BTC 1.15x, SOL 0.75x) -- hurt crash_bear/sideways/rally, existing vol_scale already handles this dynamically
exp: widen mean-reversion RSI thresholds 49/51->40/60 — tiny regression across all regimes (-0.04 composite), MR entries at 49/51 contribute marginally positive

exp: add funding rate z-score voter (72-bar lookback, z>1.0 contrarian) — near-zero impact, z-score threshold rarely triggered at hourly frequency, same issue as prior absolute-threshold funding voter
exp: replace peak-profit giveback with ATR trailing stop (2.5x ATR mult, 14-bar period) — crash_bear regressed -6.07 (ATR stop too tight in high-vol crash), overall -2.34 composite
exp: scale down mean-reversion entry size to 0.5x — uniform -0.03 regression across all regimes, MR entries contribute positively even at full size
exp: add 48-bar macro trend filter (raise MIN_VOTES+1 for counter-trend entries) -- regressed all regimes, sideways worst -0.78, filter too restrictive in choppy markets
exp: tighten RSI exits for underwater positions (loss >1.5% triggers faster exit) -- uniform -0.05 regression, premature exits before recovery
exp: add R2-weighted bonus vote for linreg voter -- near-zero impact (-0.007), high-R2 linreg already aligned with other voters so bonus vote rarely changes entry decisions

exp: add drawdown-aware position sizing dampener — MANUAL REVERT: 3/4 regimes regressed (bull -0.02, crash -0.12, rally -0.03), composite gain came entirely from std reduction via single-regime sideways +0.17. Recreated pro-cyclical anti-pattern removed in run1 commit 870fdea. Caught by new majority-regression rule (gate C).
